learningObjectives: Name eight common animals at Starters level.
Use this and that to point to animals near and far.
Form regular plural nouns with -s: one cat, two cats.
Decode familiar animal words in short texts.
Identify animals from short listening recordings with listening clues.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: There is a fish in the water.
We see elephants at the zoo.

grammarReference.explanation: Use this for one thing near you. Use that for one thing far from you.
commonMistakes: This is a cat (far away) (×) → That is a cat. (✓)
That is my dog (in your hand) (×) → This is my dog. (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Add -s to most nouns to make the plural: one cat → two cats.
Use This is or That is before a singular animal name to identify it.
commonMistakes: This a monkey (×) → This is a monkey. (✓)
That are a bear (×) → That is a bear. (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Animals
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand twelve animal words at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Animal Word Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: It says 'meow' and likes milk. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: Cats say meow and often drink milk. Dogs bark; birds sing.

questions.questionText: It is very big and has a long nose. It is an _____.
questions.explanation: Elephants are large animals with a long trunk (nose). Bears and tigers are big but have no long trunk.

questions.questionText: It lives in water and swims. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: Fish live and swim in water. Birds fly; dogs run on land.

questions.questionText: It has orange and black stripes. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: Tigers have distinctive orange and black stripes. Bears are usually one colour; monkeys are not striped.

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the animal words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Each animal has one clear description. Cat and dog are both pets but make different sounds.

pairs.right: an animal you keep at home
a place to see wild animals

exercises.title: Check: Animal Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: It says 'meow' and likes milk. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: Mèo kêu meow và thích sữa.

questions.questionText: It is very big and has a long nose. It is an _____.
questions.explanation: Voi rất to và có vòi dài.

choices.distractorNote: Chim bay, không to như voi

questions.questionText: Complete with animal words.
questions.explanation: cat/dog cho thú cưng; bird cho chim.

content.template: I have a [0]. My friend has a [1].

exercises.title: Review: Animal Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: It says 'meow' and likes milk. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: Mèo kêu meow và thích sữa.

questions.questionText: It is very big and has a long nose. It is an _____.
questions.explanation: Voi rất to và có vòi dài.

choices.distractorNote: Chim bay, không to như voi

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Wild and Farm Animals
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise elephant, tiger, monkey, bear, rabbit and zoo/farm words.

questions.questionText: It is very big with a long nose. It is an _____.
questions.explanation: Voi (elephant) to và có vòi.

questions.questionText: It has orange and black stripes. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: Hổ (tiger) có sọc cam và đen.

questions.questionText: It climbs trees and is funny. It is a _____.
questions.explanation: Khỉ (monkey) leo cây và hay làm trò.
Ghép con vật với nơi hoặc đặc điểm.

questions.questionText: Which animal has long ears?
questions.explanation: Thỏ (rabbit) có tai dài.

questions.questionText: Where do we see elephants and tigers?
questions.explanation: Zoo — sở thú — nơi xem thú hoang dã.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence about the zoo.
questions.explanation: We see + con vật + at the zoo.

questions.questionText: Which animal has long ears?

questions.questionText: Where do we see elephants and tigers?

lessons.title: Lesson 2: This, That and Plurals
lessons.learningObjective: Use this and that to point to animals and form regular plurals with -s.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose This or That
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: _____ is my cat. (The cat is in your arms.)
questions.explanation: Use this for something near you.

questions.questionText: _____ is a tiger. (The tiger is far away in the scene.)
questions.explanation: Use that for something far from you.

questions.questionText: I have two _____.
questions.explanation: Two is plural, so add -s: two dogs.

questions.questionText: There are three _____ in the tree.
questions.explanation: Three is plural, so use monkeys with -s.

exercises.title: Practice: This, That and Plurals
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with the correct words.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] is my pet cat. | [1] is a big elephant. | I see two [2].
questions.explanation: This for near (my pet); That for far (elephant); birds needs -s after two.

content.template: [0] is my pet cat. [1] is a big elephant. I see two [2].

exercises.title: Check: This, That and Plurals Quiz

questions.questionText: _____ is my cat. (The cat is in your arms.)
questions.explanation: This — vật gần bạn.

questions.questionText: I have two _____.
questions.explanation: Two → số nhiều → dogs.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete with This, That or Plurals

questions.explanation: This gần; That xa; thêm -s cho số nhiều.

content.template: [0] is my pet cat. [1] is a big elephant. I see two [2].

exercises.title: Review: This, That and Plurals Quiz

questions.questionText: _____ is my cat. (The cat is in your arms.)
questions.explanation: This — vật gần bạn.

questions.questionText: I have two _____.
questions.explanation: Two → số nhiều → dogs.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: This and That
lessons.learningObjective: Use this for animals near you and that for animals far away.

questions.questionText: _____ is my dog. (You are holding the dog.)
questions.explanation: Cầm trong tay → gần → This.

questions.questionText: _____ is a tiger. (The tiger is far in the scene.)
questions.explanation: Trong tranh xa → That.
This gần; That xa.

content.template: [0] is my cat. [1] is a big elephant.

questions.questionText: The duck is near you on the farm. You say:
questions.explanation: Gần → This duck.

questions.questionText: Choose the correct sentence:
questions.explanation: That is + a + danh từ số ít.
This is + a + con vật.

questions.questionText: The duck is near you on the farm. You say:
questions.explanation: Gần → This duck.

questions.questionText: Choose the correct sentence:
questions.explanation: That is + a + danh từ số ít.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Animal Plurals
lessons.learningObjective: Form regular plurals with -s: one cat, two cats.

questions.questionText: One cat, two _____.
questions.explanation: Hai con → cats (thêm -s).

questions.questionText: Three _____. (monkey → ?)
questions.explanation: Three → monkeys.
Thêm -s sau số lớn hơn 1.

content.template: I see two [0]. There are three [1].

questions.questionText: Grandpa counts: one, two — two _____.
questions.explanation: Two dogs — số nhiều.

questions.questionText: There are many _____ in the sky.
questions.explanation: Many → birds.

questions.questionText: I have two pet _____.
questions.explanation: Fish — số nhiều thường giữ nguyên fish ở Starters.

questions.questionText: Grandpa counts: one, two — two _____.
questions.explanation: Two dogs — số nhiều.

questions.questionText: There are many _____ in the sky.
questions.explanation: Many → birds.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Animals at the Zoo
lessons.learningObjective: Read a short text about animals and decode familiar words in context.

exercises.title: Learn: Read: A Day at the Zoo
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: A Day at the Zoo
passage.text:
Hello! We are at the zoo today.

This is a small monkey. It is funny! That is a big elephant. It is grey.

Look! Two tigers are there. They have stripes. We see birds too. The birds can fly.

I like the zoo. My favourite animal is the bear.

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: The text describes animals the children see at the zoo.

choices.text: Children describe animals at the zoo.

questions.questionText: How many tigers are there?
questions.explanation: The text says: Two tigers are there.

questions.questionText: Why does the writer use 'That' for the elephant?
questions.explanation: That is used for the elephant because it is far away; This is used for the nearby monkey.

choices.text: Because the elephant is far away.

questions.questionText: In 'They have stripes', who does they refer to?
questions.explanation: They refers to the two tigers mentioned in the previous sentence.

questions.questionText: Put the ideas in order: (1) They see monkeys and elephants (2) They arrive at the zoo (3) They see tigers and birds (4) They say their favourite animal
questions.explanation: The text moves from arrival → near animals → far animals → favourite at the end.

passage.title: At the Zoo
passage.text:
We go to the zoo on Saturday. Look! This is a big elephant.

That tiger is orange and black. The monkey is funny — it jumps!

I see a bear near the river. My sister likes the birds.

We also see cats and dogs in the pet area. We love animals!

questions.questionText: Which animal jumps and is funny?
questions.explanation: The monkey is funny — it jumps!

questions.questionText: What colour is the tiger?
questions.explanation: That tiger is orange and black.

passage.title: At the Zoo

That tiger is orange and black. The monkey is funny — it jumps!

I see a bear near the river. My sister likes the birds.

questions.questionText: When do they go to the zoo?
questions.explanation: We go to the zoo on Saturday.

choices.distractorNote: Chủ nhật — ngày đi trang trại
Thứ Hai — không có trong bài

questions.questionText: Which animal is near the river?
questions.explanation: I see a bear near the river.

questions.questionText: Who likes the birds?
questions.explanation: My sister likes the birds.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Pets at Home
lessons.learningObjective: Read for pet names and animal words in a home text.

passage.title: Pets at Home
passage.text:
Hello! I am Ben. I have two pets at home.

This is my cat. Her name is Mimi. That is my dog. His name is Rex.

We have fish in a small tank. They are orange and blue.

My friend has a bird. It can sing!

questions.questionText: What is the cat's name?
questions.explanation: This is my cat. Her name is Mimi.

questions.questionText: What is the dog's name?
questions.explanation: That is my dog. His name is Rex.

passage.title: Pets at Home
passage.text:

This is my cat. Her name is Mimi. That is my dog. His name is Rex.

We have fish in a small tank. They are orange and blue.

My friend has a bird. It can sing!

questions.questionText: What colour are the fish?
questions.explanation: They are orange and blue.

questions.questionText: What can Ben's friend's bird do?
questions.explanation: My friend has a bird. It can sing!

passage.title: Pets at Home

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Farm Animals
lessons.learningObjective: Understand farm animals and counting in a short farm text.

passage.title: Farm Animals
passage.text:
Grandpa lives on a farm. We visit him on Sunday.

There are cows and chickens. This duck is small and yellow.

That horse is big and brown. We feed the animals.

I count the dogs: one, two — two dogs! The farm is fun.

questions.questionText: When do they visit Grandpa?
questions.explanation: We visit him on Sunday.

choices.distractorNote: Thứ Bảy — ngày đi sở thú

questions.questionText: What colour is the duck?
questions.explanation: This duck is small and yellow.

passage.title: Farm Animals
passage.text:
Grandpa lives on a farm. We visit him on Sunday.

There are cows and chickens. This duck is small and yellow.

That horse is big and brown. We feed the animals.

I count the dogs: one, two — two dogs! The farm is fun.

questions.questionText: Which animal is big and brown?
questions.explanation: That horse is big and brown.

questions.questionText: How many dogs does the writer count?
questions.explanation: I count the dogs: one, two — two dogs!

passage.title: Farm Animals

There are cows and chickens. This duck is small and yellow.

I count the dogs: one, two — two dogs! The farm is fun.

questions.questionText: What do they do on the farm?
questions.explanation: We feed the animals.

questions.questionText: This text is mainly about _____.
questions.explanation: Bài mô tả trang trại và động vật.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Tick the Correct Picture
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to short descriptions and identify the correct animal.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen: Which Animal?
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: At the Pet Shop
script.setting: A pet shop with pictures of animals

lines.speaker: Examiner
lines.text: Listen carefully. Kim. Which animal is your pet?

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: This is my pet. It is a dog.

lines.speaker: Examiner
lines.text: Good. And which animal is big and grey?

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: That is the elephant.

lines.speaker: Examiner
lines.text: Which animal has stripes?

lines.speaker: Kim
lines.text: The tiger has stripes.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery. Pause after each question. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: What is Kim's pet?
questions.explanation: Kim says: It is a dog.

questions.questionText: Which animal is big and grey?
questions.explanation: Kim says: That is the elephant.

choices.distractorNote: Big but not mentioned as grey here

questions.questionText: Which animal has stripes?
questions.explanation: Kim says: The tiger has stripes.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: My Pets
lessons.learningObjective: Understand a dialogue about pets at home.

script.title: My Pets

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: Do you have pets?

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Yes. I have a cat and a dog.

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: I have a bird. It can sing!

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Birds are nice. I like animals.

script.audioNotes: Children talking about pets. Approx. 24 seconds.

questions.questionText: What pets does Ben have?
questions.explanation: Yes. I have a cat and a dog.

questions.questionText: What pet does Mai have?

lessons.title: Lesson 5: Write About Animals
lessons.learningObjective: Write short phrases to name and describe animals using this/that and plurals.

questions.explanation: Two → dogs (thêm -s).

prompts: Write one animal at the zoo.

questions.questionText: Write your answers to the prompts in the task.
questions.explanation: Chấp nhận câu trả lời đáp ứng tiêu chí. Model answer cho thấy phạm vi mong đợi.

lessons.title: Lesson 6: Talk About Animals
lessons.learningObjective: Answer simple questions about animals using this, that and animal vocabulary.

questions.questionText: You hold your cat. You say:
questions.explanation: Gần tay → This is.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: Do you have pets? You say:
questions.explanation: Yes + I have + a + con vật.

questions.questionText: The tiger is far away in the scene. You say:
questions.explanation: Xa → That is.

content.prompt: Say your favourite animal and whether it is a pet.
content.sceneDescription: Children at a zoo and at home with a cat and dog.
suggestedAnswers: My favourite animal is a cat.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

questions.questionText: You see two birds in a tree. You say:
questions.explanation: Two → birds (số nhiều).

content.prompt: Say your favourite animal and whether it is a pet.
content.sceneDescription: Children at a zoo and at home with a cat and dog.
suggestedAnswers: My favourite animal is a cat.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Point to Pets
lessons.learningObjective: Say This is and That is aloud about pets near and far.

questions.questionText: You hold your cat. You say:
questions.explanation: Gần → This is.

questions.questionText: The dog is across the room. You say:
questions.explanation: Xa → That is.

content.prompt: Point to a pet near you and one far away. Say This is… and That is…
content.sceneDescription: A boy with a cat on his lap and a dog across the room.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: Do you have pets? Best reply:
questions.explanation: Câu đầy đủ với I have.

choices.text: Yes. I have a cat and a dog.

content.prompt: Point to a pet near you and one far away. Say This is… and That is…
content.sceneDescription: A boy with a cat on his lap and a dog across the room.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Say Zoo Animals
lessons.learningObjective: Name zoo animals and use plurals in short spoken phrases.

questions.questionText: The guide points to a big elephant. You repeat:
questions.explanation: This is + an + con vật.

questions.questionText: You see two birds. You say:
questions.explanation: Two → birds.

exercises.title: Check: Say Your Favourite Zoo Animal

content.prompt: Name your favourite zoo animal and say if it is big or small.
content.sceneDescription: Zoo scene with elephant, monkey, tiger and bear.
suggestedAnswers: My favourite animal is the monkey.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

questions.questionText: The tiger is far away. You say:
questions.explanation: Xa → That is a tiger.
